title: IR Sensor + Relay Controlled Lamp
subtitle: Motion Detected → Relay Clicks → Lamp Turns ON
overview: Students learn how an IR sensor can detect motion or obstacles and automatically control a relay module. When motion is detected, the relay switches ON a lamp, demonstrating the basic principle behind automatic lighting and smart home systems.

gallery.caption: IR Sensor used for motion/object detection
Relay module acts as an electronic switch

youtubeVideos.title: IR Sensor with Arduino
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how IR sensors detect objects.

youtubeVideos.title: Arduino Home Automation Project
youtubeVideos.desc: Automatic light control using sensors and relays.

activity.title: Automatic Lamp Using IR Sensor and Relay
steps: Connect the IR Sensor to Arduino.
Connect the Relay Module to Arduino.
Place an object in front of the IR sensor.
Lamp turns ON when motion/object is detected.
Remove the object and observe lamp turning OFF.

sampleCode.title: IR Sensor Controls Relay

quiz.q: What does an IR sensor detect?
quiz.explanation: IR sensors detect objects using reflected infrared light.

quiz.q: What is the purpose of a relay?
quiz.explanation: A relay allows Arduino to control higher-power devices.

quiz.q: Which Arduino pin receives data from the IR sensor in this project?
quiz.explanation: The IR sensor output is connected to pin D2.

quiz.q: Which Arduino pin controls the relay?
quiz.explanation: Relay IN pin is connected to Arduino D8.

quiz.q: What happens when motion is detected?
quiz.explanation: Motion detection activates the relay and turns ON the lamp.

quiz.q: What sound is often heard when a relay activates?
quiz.explanation: Mechanical relays produce a clicking sound.

quiz.q: What type of project is this?
quiz.explanation: Automatic lamp control is an automation project.

quiz.q: Why are relays used with Arduino?
quiz.explanation: Relays allow low-power Arduino pins to control larger loads.

quiz.q: Which component acts as the brain of this project?
quiz.explanation: Arduino reads sensor data and controls the relay.

quiz.q: Where is this project commonly used?
quiz.explanation: Motion-controlled lighting is a common real-life application.
